metadata.description: iConnectIT's marketplace of Claude Code / Cowork plugins for WordPress, Divi 5, and web delivery.

plugins.name: divi5-tools
plugins.description: Divi 5 toolkit: SEO-optimised page JSON generator, design/SEO reviewer, brand-guide-to-Global-Variables converter, one-command import into any WordPress site (local or hosted), a Divi 5 plugin/custom-module developer skill, and a Theatre.js motion-engine reference for the DiviTheatre animation plugin.

plugins.name: wp-dev-tools
plugins.description: WordPress plugin/theme go-to-market asset generator plus a pre-submission audit against the WordPress.org Plugin Directory guidelines.

plugins.name: noloco-api
plugins.description: Work with Noloco's per-app GraphQL data API — schema introspection, CRUD queries and mutations, pagination, and WordPress sync patterns.
